reasoning_chain_text: 1. Identify the place Cari Roccaro is from.
2. Determine which county that place is in and return the county name.
original_final_question: What is the name of the county that Cari Roccaro is from? Write your answer as [ANSWER].
original_reasoning_chain: Node 1: Cari Roccaro is from which New York hamlet? Evidence: Cari Roccaro: Cari Elizabeth Roccaro (born July 18, 1994) is an American soccer defender from East Islip, New York. -> East Islip, New York
Node 2: Which county is East Islip in? Evidence: East Islip, New York: East Islip is a hamlet and CDP in the Town of Islip, Suffolk County, New York, United States. -> Suffolk
